creator: yoichi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, I've checked your port, and it looks fine.

Before committing it, May I add stub port for emacs20 and
change EMACS_SITE_LISPDIR to EMACS_VERSION_SITE_LISPDIR 
(to avoid conflict of these two ports). May I go ahead?

-- devel/eieio-emacs20/Makefile --
# New ports collection makefile for:   eieio for emacs20
# Date created:                10 December 2001
# Whom:                        Kimura Fuyuki <fuyuki@mj.0038.net>
#
# $FreeBSD$
#

MASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../eieio

EMACS_PORT_NAME=	emacs20

.include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile"

Best regards,
-- 
Yoichi Nakayama
